spoken: This is LeftGlove. It lets your AI agent navigate any website.
Here's an eBay search page. Thousands of HTML elements. For an AI agent, this is unintelligible noise.
The toddler loop solves this. A human classifies page elements once: clickable, readable, typable. LeftGlove learns the vocabulary.
Chrome, skip. Clickable. Typable. Readable. Each element gets a purpose. In seconds, the page makes sense.
Now the sieve maps every interactive element automatically. No language model needed.
Watch the agent work. It navigates to each product listing and extracts the price. Three competing earbuds priced in thirty seconds.
On-demand competitive intelligence. No scraping infrastructure. No maintenance.
Same tools, completely different site. A state park reservation system. Search for a park. Pick dates. Find an available campsite. All the way to the booking button.
LeftGlove makes AI agents more reliable, faster, and cheaper to operate. Any website. Any workflow. Zero retraining.
